---
layout: cv
title: Zachary Humphery's CV
---
# Zachary Humphreys
Game Developer, Software Development Student.

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="zachary.humphreys@gmail.com">zachary.humphreys@gmail.com</a>
| <a href="https://github.com/zaphrey.github.io/datascience_portfolio/blob/gh-pages/resume.pdf">Download PDF</a>
</div>


## Currently

Studying Software Development at BYU-Idaho.

### Specialized in

Programming, web development, game development.


### Research interests

Game development, computational geometry, machine learning, procedural generation, and physics simulations.


## Education


`2009-2021`
__Homeschooled__

`2021-2022`
__Southern Crescent Technical College for Adult Ed Classes__

`2022-now`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho


## Occupation

`2025-now`
Engine Developer at Crazyblox Games.
